displayTitle: Legends Epic Collection: The Empire Vol. 8
synopsis: Collects Empire (2002) #5-6, 8-13, & 15, Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron #½, Star Wars: A New Hope Special Edition #1-4, Star Wars: Tag and Bink Are Dead #1, and material from Star Wars Tales #1, 6, 8-10, 12, 14, 16, & 19.
title: Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Empire Vol. 8
